# progressions

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/progressions"
```

Package progressions implements secondary progressions and solar arc directions, two predictive techniques that advance natal positions forward in time.

SecondaryProgressionJD converts a transit date to a progressed Julian Day using the day\-for\-a\-year formula. CalcProgressedLongitude and CalcSolarArcLongitude return progressed planet positions for each method. CalcProgressedAngles computes the progressed Ascendant and Midheaven.

## Constants

<a name="JulianYear"></a>JulianYear is the length of one Julian year in days

```go
const JulianYear = 365.25
```

<a name="Age"></a>
## func [Age](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/progressions/progressions.go#L82>)

```go
func Age(natalJD, transitJD float64) float64
```

Age returns the age in Julian years at a given transit JD relative to natal JD

<a name="CalcProgressedAngles"></a>
## func [CalcProgressedAngles](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/progressions/progressions.go#L117>)

```go
func CalcProgressedAngles(natalJD, transitJD, geoLat, geoLon float64, hsys models.HouseSystem) (asc, mc float64, err error)
```

CalcProgressedAngles computes progressed ASC and MC. Uses solar arc in longitude for MC, then derives ASC from the RAMC of the progressed MC. Uses the standard Solar Arc in RA method for progressed angles.

<a name="CalcProgressedLongitude"></a>
## func [CalcProgressedLongitude](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/progressions/progressions.go#L25>)

```go
func CalcProgressedLongitude(planet models.PlanetID, natalJD, transitJD float64) (lon, speed float64, err error)
```

CalcProgressedLongitude returns the ecliptic longitude and speed of a planet at the secondary progressed time corresponding to the given transit JD. The returned speed is in progressed degrees per real day \(i.e. actual speed / JulianYear\).

<a name="CalcProgressedSpecialPoint"></a>
## func [CalcProgressedSpecialPoint](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/progressions/progressions.go#L155>)

```go
func CalcProgressedSpecialPoint(sp models.SpecialPointID, natalJD, transitJD, geoLat, geoLon float64, hsys models.HouseSystem) (float64, error)
```

CalcProgressedSpecialPoint returns the progressed longitude of a special point \(ASC/MC\) using the Q1/Solar Arc in RA method.

<a name="CalcSolarArcLongitude"></a>
## func [CalcSolarArcLongitude](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/progressions/progressions.go#L56>)

```go
func CalcSolarArcLongitude(planet models.PlanetID, natalJD, transitJD float64) (lon, speed float64, err error)
```

CalcSolarArcLongitude returns the solar arc directed position of a natal planet. Solar Arc Direction = natal longitude \+ solar arc offset Speed is approximately the sun's progressed speed / JulianYear

<a name="SecondaryProgressionJD"></a>
## func [SecondaryProgressionJD](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/progressions/progressions.go#L18>)

```go
func SecondaryProgressionJD(natalJD, transitJD float64) float64
```

SecondaryProgressionJD converts a real\-time JD to the progressed JD. Secondary progressions: 1 day of real time after birth = 1 year of progressed life. progressedJD = natalJD \+ \(transitJD \- natalJD\) / JulianYear

<a name="SolarArcOffset"></a>
## func [SolarArcOffset](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/progressions/progressions.go#L38>)

```go
func SolarArcOffset(natalJD, transitJD float64) (float64, error)
```

SolarArcOffset returns the solar arc offset in degrees for a given transit JD. Solar Arc = Sun's progressed longitude \- Sun's natal longitude
